title: comforting peppery moroccan chinese leaf tagine
description: velvety and comforting moroccan dish featuring chinese leaf and a hint of peppery flavors

ingredients.name: chinese leaf
ingredients.notes: fresh chinese leaf (napa cabbage) for wrapping the dish

ingredients.name: ginger
ingredients.notes: grated fresh ginger for warmth and spice

ingredients.name: coriander
ingredients.notes: ground coriander for added warmth and spice

ingredients.name: flour
ingredients.notes: all-purpose flour for thickening the sauce

ingredients.name: vegetable broth
ingredients.notes: low-sodium vegetable broth for cooking the leaf

instructions: heat the olive oil in a large saucepan over medium heat
add the chopped onion and saut 8 until softened
add the minced garlic and grated ginger and cook for 1 minute
add the ground cumin and coriander and cook for 1 minute
add the black pepper and flour and cook for 1 minute
add the vegetable broth and stir to combine
add the chinese leaf and cook until wilted
transfer the mixture to a corn husk wrap and serve immediately
